title: glechoma prostrata
intro: Glechoma prostrata, also known as Creeping Thyme or Creeping Lemon Thyme, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen herb native to Europe and Asia. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, colds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Glechoma prostrata include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical ointment, with the dried leaves and stems often used in herbal supplements and skincare products.
